benchmarkRequirements.referenceModel: GPT-5.5 Pro or newer Pro model

qualificationBasis: OpenAI identifies 5.6 Sol as the flagship GPT-5.6 model with the strongest capability for complex research work. Ultra is the maximum reasoning mode with automatic task delegation. OpenAI does not publish an exact equivalence to GPT-5.5 Pro.
publicationRule: Reject editions unless the model has passed the Pro-reference benchmark and runtime metadata exactly matches the required model and reasoning effort.
